data.title: Mulvihill Enhanced Split Preferred Share ETF Announces Year End Results
data.description: On March 28, 2026, the Mulvihill Enhanced Split Preferred Share ETF (formerly Mulvihill U.S. Health Care Enhanced Yield ETF) traded on the TSX under the symbol SPFD, revealed its 2025 operational outcomes. There was a $0.67 million rise in net assets for unit holders, equivalent to $0.31 per unit. As of December 31, 2025, the net assets for unit holders stood at $25.29 million, translating to $9.36 per unit. Throughout the year, cash distributions to unitholders amounted to $2.26 million, or $1.00 per unit, were disbursed.

data.title: INJ price may hit $3.26 by mid-April with current price at $2.90 and RSI at 42.01. Potential rally if it breaks $2.98 in 2-3 weeks.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Injective (INJ) is currently priced at $2.90, with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) reading of 42.01. Analysis indicates a probable uptrend towards a resistance level of $3.26 if INJ surpasses the $2.98 pivot level in the next 2-3 weeks.

data.title: Mulvihill Canadian Bank Enhanced Yield ETF Announces Year End Results
data.description: In its latest report for the year ended December 31, 2025, the Mulvihill Canadian Bank Enhanced Yield ETF (TSX: CBNK) revealed a significant increase in net assets for unit holders. The net assets attributable to unit holders saw a rise of $47.04 million, reaching a total of $130.48 million, which translates to $3.75 per unit. Additionally, cash distributions to unitholders amounted to $8.67 million, equivalent to $0.70 per unit, paid out during the year. These results indicate a positive financial performance for the Fund.

data.title: Marvell, Caterpillar Lead Five Stocks To Watch In Weak Market
data.description: Last week, Marvell's stock showed resilience as it surged in a weak market despite pulling back from a buy point. Caterpillar, another standout AI stock, also demonstrated strength. These two companies, along with three others, are currently top stocks to monitor in the volatile market conditions. This positive performance amidst market challenges highlights their potential for growth and stability.

data.title: TCOM Investor Alert: Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP Encourages TCOM Investors with Losses to Contact the Firm
data.description: Have you purchased securities of TCOM from April 30, 2024, to January 13, 2026? Investors in Trip.com Group Limited (NASDAQ: TCOM) are impacted by a securities fraud class action lawsuit covering the period from April 30, 2024, to January 13, 2026. Investors have a deadline to seek further action.

data.title: Zoomex Launches Earning Initiative as Inflation Drives Shift Toward Capital Efficiency in Crypto Markets
data.description: A recent announcement from Zoomex, a crypto exchange based in Victoria, Seychelles, indicates a shift in user behavior towards yield and systematic strategies due to uncertainty about interest rates. The platform has launched a new initiative highlighting its earning products in response to growing demand. This move comes amidst concerns about rising inflation.

data.title: Arcutis Presents New Phase 2 Results in Infants with Atopic Dermatitis in Late-Breaking Session Today at the 2026 American Academy of Dermatology Annual Meeting
data.description: Today at the 2026 American Academy of Dermatology (AAD) conference, Arcutis presented new Phase 2 results for infants with atopic dermatitis in a late-breaking session. The study revealed promising outcomes for this population, with a significant improvement in symptoms noted. These findings offer hope for infants suffering from this condition.

data.title: Kymera Therapeutics Presents KT-621 BroADen Data in Late-Breaking Research Session at the American Academy of Dermatology (AAD) Annual Meeting
data.description: An insightful presentation showcased encouraging results from the BroADen Phase 1b study for atopic dermatitis, underlining the promising oral characteristics of KT-621.
